generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. A graceful anthropomorphic leopard cat discovering a glowing, spiritual mountain spring. It holds a single ornate golden cup overflowing with clear sparkling water. Five streams of water pour from the cup into a pond filled with lotuses. Cool, atmospheric moonlit sanctuary. Deep teals and soft silvers. Full bleed. No borders. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat facial structure, distinct white stripes from nose to forehead, white muzzle, and large white spots behind black ears. Slender and agile feline build. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Ace of Cups is the 'Source of Life'—the discovery of the pure headwaters where the leopard cat's soul finds true emotional resonance.

meanings.upright: Love, potential, emotional abundance, spiritual intuition, and new beginnings in the realm of the heart.
meanings.reversed: Blocked emotions, suppressed intuition, or a period of emotional drought.

ecology.mapping_note: Ace of Cups represents the 'Source'—the critical importance of high-altitude unpolluted streams that feed the entire ecosystem.

website.excerpt: Discovering the glowing spring at the heart of the forest, the leopard cat finds the source of all life.
website.seo_description: Ace of Cups reimagined as a leopard cat finding the mystical source of life.

meaning.zh: Love, potential, emotional abundance, spiritual intuition, and new beginnings in the realm of the heart.
meaning.en: Love, potential, emotional abundance, spiritual intuition, and new beginnings in the realm of the heart.
